videos.title: How to prepare for your first Sportive - Tour de Yorkshire
videos.description:
Last weekend was the Tour De Yorkshire Sportive taking in some of the same roads the pros would be belting down later in the afternoon. Not only do you get an idea of what went down but I also give you some of my top tips when it comes to preparing for a big event!




Looking to buy a Kickr or other Wahoo products? If you use this link you'll be helping to support the channel, thank you! http://bit.ly/WahooChrisPritchard

Looking for coaching? Head over to https://whatsyourmeta.com/ James McCallum provides one of the best services out there. tell him pritch sent you!
If you want to follow me on this journey:
Strava: https://goo.gl/QJbxDG
Twitter: https://twitter.com/chris_pritch
Facebook: https://goo.gl/zR1PJ8
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chris_pritch_/

If you want to know more about CyclingHub:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CyclingHubTV/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cycling.hub/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/CyclingHubTV

Thanks for watching!
tags: how to prepare for a sportive

videos.title: Tour de Yorkshire 2019 Sportive - GoPro Highlights
videos.description:
This is a highlight reel of taking part in the Tour de Yorkshire Sportive held on May 5th 2019.  The event was located in Leeds, starting near Headingly and finishing on the Headrow where the Tour de France's Grand Départ started in 2014.  The route was 77 miles long and climbed over 7000ft.  

Along the way we saw both Brownlee brothers, and had a chat with the Mavic Neutral service car, along with taking in the wonderful Yorkshire countryside.  

The track was 'Slip' by Geographer
Finally this was shot with various GoPros, cut together in Premiere Pro, and coloured using Red Giant Magic Bullet Looks.

videos.title: RIDING WITH TOUR OF YORKSHIRE WINNER *Power Meter Giveaway*
videos.description:
took to the MTB trails today with recently crowned Tour of Yorkshire winner Chris Lawless. Also - 4iii are giving away a power meter to one of you guys!!!

I'll be running the competition on Patreon. To be eligible - Be at least an 'Americano' Patreon here: https://bit.ly/2OTJXRX



SUPPORT THE VLOG:
• Check me out on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2OTJXRX

CHANNEL PARTNERS:
• Check out Siroko Sunglasses (15% - 30% discount): https://srko.co/cjeffers

• Check out Drift Cameras (USE CODE: JEFFERS10 for 10% discount):
http://bit.ly/DriftCameronJeffers

• Music is from: http://bit.ly/MUSICBED

Social media stuff!
•Facebook: http://facebook.com/cyclingcam
•Instagram: http://instagram.com/cameronjeffers
•Twitter: http://twitter.com/cameron_jeffers
•Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2483501

Enquiries contact: cameron@cyclinghub.tv
